name: long-running
description: Harness for AI Agents working across context windows — multi-session continuity, feature tracking, progress logging, model assignment & review system, Verification Pipeline (7 checks beyond build success), v2.5 release gates (Gate 1 AC coverage, Gate 2 NFR compliance, Gate 3 bug verification), v2.8 Gate 4 UI Control Coverage with /emit-control-spec command + .agent/ui-controls/feature-N.json manifest (Hybrid A+B with mockup cross-validation, drift detection, control-level unit-test enforcement, --force-control-coverage / --skip-control-manifest overrides), /nfr-check + /qa-coverage-check commands with --include-controls flag, incremental development pattern, design doc impact check on /add-feature & /edit-feature, /scan-changes upstream traceability enforcer (v2.7.0 detect orphan changes/commits + reverse-map files to features; v2.7.1 ignore patterns via .agent/scan-ignore + legacy commit cutoff via feature_list.created_at), /help command with mode-based guide, and integration with ui-mockup, system-design-doc, qa-ui-test, dotnet-dev skills
